subcodes.first_line: O esteemed one! The verses were perused. Though they flowed like running water, their substance was agreeable [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای جناب جذاب اشعار قرائت گردید هر چند مانند آب روان بود ولی مضمون موافق طبع
subcodes.subjects: @self-concealment of the Manifestation of God, @love of God, @humility; meekness; lowliness
